pr.title: Notable Non-Record: H-Net Tokenization — 0.6846 BPB — Hierarchical Token Processing

output.summary: Hierarchical token merge/unmerge pipeline processes encoder layers at half resolution, then restores gated tokens with per-position projections before full-resolution decoding.
techniques: Gated token merge with learned softmax weights
Encoder at T/2 with coarse-resolution skip storage
Per-position projections to unmerge tokens before decoder
